mapper.sql: p.id AS spu_id, p.spu_code, p.name, p.category_id, c.name AS category_name, p.main_image_url, MIN(s.sale_price) AS min_price, MAX(s.sale_price) AS max_price, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS sku_count, COALESCE(SUM(i.available_stock), 0) AS total_stock, p.status, p.created_at, p.description
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM product_spu p JOIN category c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN product_sku s ON s.spu_id = p.id LEFT JOIN inventory i ON i.sku_id = s.id GROUP BY p.id, p.spu_code, p.name, p.category_id, c.name, p.main_image_url, p.status, p.created_at, p.description ORDER BY p.id ASC

SELECT
FROM product_spu p JOIN category c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN product_sku s ON s.spu_id = p.id LEFT JOIN inventory i ON i.sku_id = s.id WHERE p.id = #{spuId} GROUP BY p.id, p.spu_code, p.name, p.category_id, c.name, p.main_image_url, p.status, p.created_at, p.description
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_spu (spu_code, name, category_id, description, main_image_url, status) VALUES (#{spuCode}, #{name}, #{categoryId}, #{description}, #{mainImageUrl}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE product_spu SET spu_code = #{spuCode}, name = #{name}, category_id = #{categoryId}, description = #{description}, main_image_url = #{mainImageUrl}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.parent_id, c.level, c.sort_order, CASE WHEN c.status = 'active' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS enabled, COUNT(p.id) AS product_count FROM category c LEFT JOIN product_spu p ON p.category_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.parent_id, c.level, c.sort_order, c.status ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.id ASC

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.parent_id, c.level, c.sort_order, CASE WHEN c.status = 'active' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS enabled, COUNT(p.id) AS product_count FROM category c LEFT JOIN product_spu p ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE c.id = #{categoryId} GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.parent_id, c.level, c.sort_order, c.status
SELECT id FROM product_spu WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY id
mapper.update:
UPDATE category
name = #{name}, status = #{status},
sort_order = #{sortOrder},
updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)
WHERE id = #{categoryId}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM color ORDER BY id LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM size_option ORDER BY id LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_sku (sku_code, spu_id, color_id, size_id, sale_price, original_price, status) VALUES (#{skuCode}, #{spuId}, #{colorId}, #{sizeId}, #{salePrice}, #{originalPrice}, #{status})
INSERT INTO inventory (sku_id, available_stock, locked_stock, sold_stock) SELECT #{skuId}, 0, 0, 0 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inventory WHERE sku_id = #{skuId})
mapper.update: UPDATE product_sku SET sale_price = #{salePrice}, original_price = #{originalPrice}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT st.code FROM product_style_tag pst JOIN style_tag st ON st.id = pst.style_tag_id WHERE pst.spu_id = #{spuId} ORDER BY st.id
SELECT id FROM style_tag WHERE code = #{tag} OR name = #{tag} ORDER BY id LIMIT 1
